text_original: The Dao is (like) the emptiness of a vessel;
text_normalized: The Dao is (like) the emptiness of a vessel;

text_original: and in our employment of it we must be on our guard against all fulness.
text_normalized: and in our employment of it we must be on our guard against all fulness.

text_original: How deep and unfathomable it is, as if it were the Honoured Ancestor of all things!
text_normalized: How deep and unfathomable it is, as if it were the Honoured Ancestor of all things!

text_original: We should blunt our sharp points, and unravel the complications of things;
text_normalized: We should blunt our sharp points, and unravel the complications of things;

text_original: we should attemper our brightness, and bring ourselves into agreement with the obscurity of others.
text_normalized: we should attemper our brightness, and bring ourselves into agreement with the obscurity of others.

text_original: How pure and still the Dao is, as if it would ever so continue!
text_normalized: How pure and still the Dao is, as if it would ever so continue!

text_original: I do not know whose son it is.
text_normalized: I do not know whose son it is.

text_original: It might appear to have been before God.
text_normalized: It might appear to have been before God.
